entry.title: Identity Federation: IAS in Proxy Mode - Substitution of Subject Name Identifier
entry.content:
Identity Federation:  IAS in Proxy Mode - Substitution of Subject Name Identifier  

 Context

Existing IAS customers may be sending a SubjectNameIdentifier as part of SAML response (say EmailID for FieldGlass) from their idP and to onboard another SAP Cloud Application (say Ariba,  may need EmployeeID ) a different SubjectNameIdentifier is needed.

We have a customer who informed that from there from their landscape another IdP instance cannot be created as it is not allowing multiple IdPs against a single SAP CIS tenant  (   https://<SAP IAS tenant  id>-accounts.ondemand.com/admin ) ot suite-integrated) 

Solution:

Step 1:
Identify the attribute that will serve as the NameID for the second SAP Cloud Application (SP). Ensure this attribute is included in the Corporate IdP’s SAML response within the additional attributes section.

Step 2:
Configure the corresponding IAS application for the second SP so that it substitutes the SubjectNameIdentifier with the chosen additional attribute.

 

Here “IdP Proxy” is the IAS Application which is substituting the NameId

 

Configurations: 

Prerequisites:

Configuration: SAP Ariba SSO with SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication

Identity Federation: SAP Ariba SSO with SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication

 

  • Use Identity Authentication user store” = ON  Although User Data is not picked up from CIS User Storethis is needed 

(Path : Home > Corporate Identity Providers> select the IDP> Identity Federation >  Enable “Use Identity Authentication user store” )

 

  • Subject Name Identifier > Primary Attribute

Option 1: Standard Attribute
Source = Corporate Identity Provider
Value = lastName

Option 2: Custom Attribute
Source = expression
Value = ${corporateIdP.attributeName}

  ( Path : Home> Application & Resources > Application >    (Select the Application > Subject Name Identifier)

 

 

SAML Responses will be as below:

Corporate IdP to SAP CIS (IAS)

 

CIS to SP ( Ariba)

entry.title: DEMOs: App Review Order Progress - Multilevel View
entry.content:
Exciting news coming to you in the area of manufacturing with the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.1 Release. The new app Review Order Progress - Multilevel View (F7681) is finally here. If you want to read further details continue here: New Review Order Progress - Multilevel View App

Below you can watch all relevant demos: 

 

Demo: Teaser Review Order Progress - Multilevel View

 

Demo: Teaser Review Order Progress - Multilevel View

 

Demo: Review Order Progress - Overview 

 

Demo: Review Order Progress - Overview

 

Demo: Solving Issues Using the Review Order Progress App

 

Demo: Solving Issues Using the Review Order Progress App

 

Find All of Our Assets   

SAP S/4HANA Cloud is the foundation of the intelligent, sustainable enterprise and is an innovative, robust, and scalable ERP. We at Cloud ERP Product Success and Cloud Co-Innovation offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you below:

entry.content: (comment posted as answer)

entry.title: Re: ALV Grid Refresh after Handle_get_changed
entry.content: Did you execute method check_changed_data ?

entry.title: Re: Brazil Tax Reform - NF-e Technical Note 2024.002 and...
entry.content: Please, about tax reformr I have a problem during applied 3556404 because the condition type w dont exist. (sapappl 617). The note 2056663 - Introduction of "W" calculation rule (percentage with 6 decimal places) create this type but need the package VF_PRC_QTYCNVFACT. This is the problem the package is crated by notes ca-gtf-cte but this notes have a note 1915492 in your pre-requisites. I can't download it and the portal says it doesn't exist. Anyone else having this problem? Thanks Eduardo

entry.title: Re: ALV Grid Refresh after Handle_get_changed
entry.content:
The line was inserted by the user, hence you must not insert the line yourself, instead call the method CHECK_CHANGED_DATA which transfers any data changed by the user into the ALV internal table.

The refresh is to be done by filling via the method MODIFY_CELL of the parameter ER_DATA_CHANGED of the DATA_CHANGED event. You don't need to call REFRESH_TABLE_DISPLAY.

entry.title: Re: Request for Guidance on Resolving ChaRM Issue Post-SA...
entry.content: Dear Vera Jiang, Thank you for your prompt and valuable response. Apologies for not mentioning earlier, but we have recently migrated our systems from Oracle Database to HANA Database and have moved to a private cloud environment. If any of the following three attributes—SID, Installation Number (10-digit), and System Number (18-digit)—are changed and differ from the previous system, a duplicated system with an extended SID may be generated. As KBA 1727294 will only be applicable when the recommended value of 1 is used, and all three attributes (SID, Installation Number, and System Number) remain the same as in the previous system. Kind regards, Srinivas V

entry.title: Re: COMMIT/ROLLBACK in Custom Action in SAP RAP
entry.content:
thanks for the suggestion @WRoeckelein. I'll give it a try, but based on the documentation, I'm not sure if it supports what we or at least I try to do. In my use cases I need to either execute an EML statement of a different RAP BO (which will trigger a commit) or call FM's or other logic that require a COMMIT statement before we can continue. In these cases I need to make sure that I also know the result before I can continue, and not just have the commit or rollback to happen together with my RAP object's runtime.

For example, in my last use case, I needed to convert planned orders to production orders and then update the production order header . I obviously can't execute the EML statement to update the header of the production before the production order is created as I don't know the production order id, and I will also not execute that part if the production order was not created. But I don't see how I can do the same by using bgPF?

entry.title: Re: Error in RFC communication while archiving a document
entry.content: I am getting the same error, please let me know if it is resolved.

entry.title: The Data Revolution: Bridging The Gap Between Technology And Business
entry.content:
In today's fast-paced business world, data is the lifeblood of organizations. However, many companies struggle with a significant challenge: a "data divide" between technology experts and business decision-makers.

This gap leads to delays in responding to critical signals and hinders agile decision-making. Addressing this divide is crucial for a seamless flow of insights from data to decisions.

 

The Data Divide: A Growing Challenge

The disconnect between those who manage data and those who use it for business decisions is becoming increasingly apparent. Technology experts often focus on databases, algorithms, and data structures, while decision-makers prioritize KPIs, market trends, and strategic objectives.

This communication gap can result in missed opportunities and inefficient use of valuable data resources.

 

AI: The Game-Changer

Business users need data insights delivered in real-time and within the appropriate business context. This requires a holistic integration between data platforms and business applications, with data products based on harmonized business data models. Connecting insights directly to business decisions is a critical factor, especially in the age of Artificial Intelligence (AI).

AI is revolutionizing how organizations handle and utilize data. Moving forward, every organization will essentially become a data manufacturer for AI, and business context will be a non-negotiable ingredient for production-ready AI solutions. By unifying data platforms and business applications, companies can establish the foundation for Business AI to flourish.

Unifying Applications, Data, and AI

To truly leverage the potential of data and AI, organizations need a comprehensive strategy that brings together applications, data, and AI in a cohesive ecosystem. This approach should include:

  • Unparalleled Applications: Comprehensive, modular, and extensible business applications that cover every aspect of operations.
  • Unmatched Data: A centralized data cloud that turns valuable business data from every part of the organization into a semantically rich treasure trove.
  • Unrivaled AI: Collaborative AI agents that enhance operations, drive real-time insights, and optimize decision-making at scale.

The Future of Enterprise Data Management

Several key trends will shape the landscape of enterprise data management:

  • Business Data Fabric: Organizations will increasingly adopt a business data fabric approach, providing a unified and scalable data platform that seamlessly connects data from various sources, including SAP and non-SAP applications, on-premises systems, and cloud-native solutions.
  • Insight Apps: Pre-built, AI-infused insight applications will become commonplace, offering out-of-the-box analytical models, dashboards, and workflows for industry- and function-specific use cases. These apps will help organizations make timely decisions and respond to critical business signals in real-time.
  • Data Products: Companies will leverage pre-built data products that provide a 360-degree view of critical business processes across all applications. These products will ensure consistency and maintain business context, making data instantly connected, actionable, and contextual.
  • AI Copilots: AI-powered copilots will augment decision-making processes, automating complex business tasks and providing intelligent recommendations based on comprehensive data analysis.
  • Governance and Compliance: As data becomes increasingly critical to business operations, robust governance and compliance frameworks will be essential to ensure data quality, security, and regulatory adherence.

Embracing the Data-Driven Future

The future of business lies in the ability to harness data effectively, bridging the gap between technology and business users. By adopting a comprehensive approach that unifies applications, data, and AI, organizations can unlock transformative insights, connect all their data sources, and foster reliable AI-driven decision-making. The most successful organizations will embrace this data revolution, creating a seamless flow from data to decisions and leveraging advanced technologies like business data fabrics, insight apps, and AI copilots to gain a competitive edge.

The time to act is now; invest in building a strong data foundation that meets today's needs and prepares you for the AI-driven future, turning the data divide into a data dividend, driving innovation, efficiency, and growth across all aspects of business.

Discover how SAP Business Suite can help your business be more resilient to business challenges and responsive to opportunities.

Follow me on LinkedIn.

Good day!

We have created Purchase Order and Purchase Requisition workflow from Manage Workflow app.
Our requirement is -
How End user can approve / reject Workflow via outlook mail?
Please note we are using SAP S/4 Hana Private cloud version.

Thanks in Advance, 
Ankit.

entry.title: PPDS Shift Definitions vs Shift definition maintained at S4(External Capacity)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

In S4 with embedded PPDS, I see two ways to manage Shift definitions:

  1. Define the Shifts in S4 and transfer the Resources to PPDS, allowing them to reference the external capacity maintained in S4.

  2. Modify the transfer settings in CFC9 by unchecking "external capacity," then transfer the Resources to PPDS and maintain the Shift definitions directly in S4-PPDS.

Additionally, I would like to understand if there is any impact when using shift definitions maintained in the PPDS system from a Fiori perspective. Do Fiori apps read and recognize the shift definitions & Downtimes stored in PPDS?

Thanks

Debasis Nanda

entry.title: Re: Could Race Conditions Occur in This SAP CAP Scenario?
entry.content:
@Willem_Pardaens

Hi, are you okay ?

The test is that two users are making two different posts at the same time, but in different entities.

However, the entity of the first user is picking up the email of the second user because they are running simultaneously.

entry.title: Re: Auto generate text for a field
entry.content: Hi Arun, Thanks. Challenge here is that parent Object is a field, defined within custom MDF object, rather than defining parent and child relationship. In child object, we have to mention parent object in one of the field as input. It is difficult to use given functions of business rule.

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch PLUS Luzern, 29. April 2025
entry.content:
Liebe SAP Community der Zentralschweiz

Bald ist es wieder Zeit für einen gemeinsamen Event. Wir freuen uns, den nächsten SAP Stammtisch (PLUS) Event in Luzern ankündigen zu dürfen. Seid am 29. April dabei, wir halten wieder spannende Themen für euch bereit:

  • UNIT Test your Business Objects in RAP)
  • SAP BTP ABAP Environment – Entwicklung einer Side-by-Side Extension

Registriert euch bitte direkt hier oder unter nachfolgendem Link:

Anmeldung SAP Stammtisch PLUS Luzern

Bis bald, wir freuen uns auf euch!

Eure SAP Community Luzern (Zentralschweiz)

entry.title: SAP ALM Roadshow
entry.content:
Join the SAP ALM Roadshow and learn to shape your ALM Strategy, manage your on-premise and cloud, hybrid landscapes and get the most value from your SAP solutions.

Experience the empowerment through an in-person event. Network with experts to accelerate your implementations and efficiently operate your SAP landscape using SAP’s ALM portfolio. A great opportunity to engage with SAP's ALM experts and product management team.

Registration will be opening soon!

entry.title: Re: Story Report in SuccessFactors- I am trying to get co...
entry.content: Hello Olga, Thank you for info and I again tried the solution you gave. To be clear and if I am understanding correctly your suggestion. While building query I left user information as dimension. I set weight as Measure. I also set Objective Id as Dimension. Then went to designer mode, added table widget. added user information as dimension. selected cross tab and added weight(measure) as column dimension and this worked. Now added calculation and selected type Aggregation, gave a name for calculation. Under properties selected count dimension and selected aggregation dimension as Objective ID.

entry.title: Re: Public Cloud - Manage Automatic Payment for Payment M...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

The "H" payment method has a specific configuration that requires the creation of the variants mentioned in the error message you got.

To solve your problem, you have to create those variants using the Post Bills of Exchange Presentation Document app and filling the fields accordingly to your needs :

Once you have created all the variants, launch your automatic payment again and see if the payment runs afterwards.

I hope this will help you solve your issue.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Renewal of SAP Router Certificate
entry.content: Thanks Nice documentation

entry.title: Re: Yard Logistics: Error while creating new business par...
entry.content:
Hej Ajit,

many many thanks for your reply and answer. I do have more question, because I did not understand everything. 

Is it correct, that I have two Directories in which I need to customize SAP? First is "Cross-Application Components > SAP Business Partner" and Second is "Yard Logistics" folder.

Let's start with Cross-Application Components:
There I need to define: 1. BP Role (ZYL_DR)  & 2. BP Role Type (ZYL_DR) and 3. Number Range. There are 4 Number Ranges Nos defined. How do I know which number range is used by my BP Role? Do i need to define the number range here as "External"? Do I need to put the "D" in front of the number here (the system does it automtically, or?). Do I need to define a new number range? How is the connection between this business partner role and the business partner driver? 

Than go to the Yard Logistics Folder:

Here I define the number range for the driver, which looks like this: 

Do I need to define this number as external? And do i need to add the "D" here?

 

Many thanks and have a good start to the new week 🙂

Sandra

entry.title: Re: O Captain! My Captain! Agentic AI Leads the Way in the Digital Age

Have a great day, everyone!

entry.title: Re: Splitting criteria change
entry.content: Create a custom routine in VOFM, insert the required logic, assign this routine to the field Data VBRK/VBRP in copy control.  Consider also RV60AFZA

entry.title: Extending view S1 on fiori app breaks model in extension project
entry.content:
Hello i am trying to extend the S1(main view) in fiori application F0843 using extension project.

But every time i try to implement it (using "copy of the original view") the app breaks even before i change anything.

After some debuging i found that the oModel "oFrontend" and others are not present after the replacement.

Before S1 replacement

After:

After S1 replacement

Manifest:


Please help me,

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: COMMIT/ROLLBACK in Custom Action in SAP RAP
entry.content: @toonvl ok, if you need the result, there is IMHO no possibility. But are you sure a EML statement of a different entity will trigger a COMMIT? IMHO this will just part of the current RAP transaction and will be committed/rollbacked according to the current transactions result. But you could IMHO update the PO header in a bgPF task which will be executed depending if a COMMIT/ROLLBACK will happen. The only problem still remaining is the forwarding of the order id, but you could use a database table with mapping of planned order  id to PO order id and create the entry after BAPI call for PO creation so can read it in the the bgPF (and the bgPF has the planned order id as a parameter). COXT_BAPI_ORDER_CREATE has iv_commit parameter.

entry.title: Re: Story Report in SuccessFactors- I am trying to get co...
entry.content: Hello Olga, Thank you for info and I again tried the solution you gave. To be clear and if I am understanding correctly your suggestion. While building query I left user information as dimension. I set weight as Measure. I also set Objective Id as Dimension. Then went to designer mode, added table widget. added user information as dimension. selected cross tab and added weight(measure) as column dimension and this worked. Now added calculation and selected type Aggregation, gave a name for calculation. Under properties selected count dimension and selected aggregation dimension as Objective ID. With this new issue is anyone with null or no objective is showing s 1. I want it to show as 0. As this is NOT the solution I tried another option to convert objective Id as measure instead of dimension. I then went to table widget then add calculation. again use Agrregation, Count excl null measure objective ID. now it asks aggregation dimension here. I don't get obejctive ID as its measure if I select user Id or Business Unit the count is as 1 even for employees with 5 objectives. Also please stop asuming that i didn't go through training. i did go through story reporting administration training and job aids multiple times. the issue with training is they just teach simple things like 2+2 =4 but don't teach If (A+B/C*D) greater than equal to1 then count or sum etc.. or to get % of employees in business unit with atleast 1 objective kind of scenario.

entry.title: Re: How to change the relationship fields between table i...
entry.content: @jacint Yes, this kind of helped. however don't you think we need an option to edit the relationship type and able to select what the connection is based on. This created a new problem as now it counts even employee without objective as 1

entry.title: Re: How to change the relationship fields between table in query designer
entry.content: Hello Olga,

entry.title: Re: How to change the relationship fields between table in query designer
entry.content: Hello Olga, Thank you for info and I again tried the solution you gave. To be clear and if I am understanding correctly your suggestion. While building query I left user information as dimension. I set weight as Measure. I also set Objective Id as Dimension. Then went to designer mode, added table widget. added user information as dimension. selected cross tab and added weight(measure) as column dimension and this worked. Now added calculation and selected type Aggregation, gave a name for calculation. Under properties selected count dimension and selected aggregation dimension as Objective ID. With this new issue is anyone with null or no objective is showing s 1. I want it to show as 0. As this is NOT the solution I tried another option to convert objective Id as measure instead of dimension. I then went to table widget then add calculation. again use Agrregation, Count excl null measure objective ID. now it asks aggregation dimension here. I don't get obejctive ID as its measure if I select user Id or Business Unit the count is as 1 even for employees with 5 objectives. Also please stop asuming that i didn't go through training. i did go through story reporting administration training and job aids multiple times. the issue with training is they just teach simple things like 2+2 =4 but don't teach If (A+B/C*D) greater than equal to1 then count or sum etc.. or to get % of employees in business unit with atleast 1 objective kind of scenario.

entry.title: Re: OBYC and KW
entry.content: Thank you for the advice I have double checked and both have been maintained. The actual tolerance works correctly - the issue is how it is deriving which gl code to post to.

entry.title: Dynamically hiding parameters AND selection texts
entry.content:
Good afternoon!

I'm trying to hide a parameter based on the tcode the program is used in. The selection screen has several tabs with input parameters. When I tried the following code on the first tab, everything worked fine: Neither the input or the selection text of the parameter is shown.
However, on the next tab, for some reason it does hide the input fields, but it still shows the selection texts. 
With the shown code, the first case is what does work correctly. The second case (with screen2) doesnt work. I first tried only using the 'active' part and setting it to 0, which is how I had it in the first place for the parameters that do correctly get hidden. Then I tried setting 'screen-invisible' to 1, and to 0, and putting either 'invisible' first or 'active' first, but nothing works. 

Does anyone have any idea what might be going wrong here?

Thank you so much in advance!

 

AT SELECTION-SCREEN OUTPUT.
   IF sy-tcode = 'TCODE'. 
    LOOP AT SCREEN INTO DATA(ls_screen).
      CASE ls_screen-name.
        WHEN 'P_NAME'. 
        ls_screen-active = '0'. 
        MODIFY SCREEN FROM ls_screen.
      ENDCASE.
    ENDLOOP.
    ELSEIF sy-tcode <> 'TCODE'. 
    LOOP AT SCREEN INTO DATA(ls_screen2).
      CASE ls_screen2-name.
        WHEN 'P_NAME'. 
        ls_screen2-invisible = '1'.
        ls_screen2-active = '0'. 
        MODIFY SCREEN FROM ls_screen2.
      ENDCASE.
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: Dynamically hiding parameters AND selection texts
entry.content: I just realized I should have changed the parameter names, so for clarity, the two parameters are supposed to be two totally different parameters.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps web preview stopped working suddenly
entry.content: Hi @Irk  we haven't identified any problems. If you're still experiencing this issue, can you please share more information (have you tried incognito, what landscape, trial or not, etc)?

entry.title: Re: how to create in SAP C4C a report that measures the d...
entry.content: 3) (ValidityToDate GT Tomorrow) * Period to current and aggregated total on SalesPhase, 4) (ValidityToDate LT Tomorrow) * Period days and aggregated total on SalesPhase

entry.title: OAuth request is failing in CPI using standard integration(Replicate B2B Customer From S4HANA To SAP
entry.content:
Hi All,
Good Evening!

We are configuring a standard integration Replicate B2B Customer From S4HANA To SAP Commerce Cloud. Which is a part of this package - SAP Commerce Cloud Integration with SAP S/4HANA.

We are facing these errors-

1. com.sap.gateway.core.ip.component.odata.exception.OsciException: Error in retrieving Authorization header, cause: java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Status code:400; Reason:{
"error" : "invalid_request",
"error_description" : "Missing grant type"
}


2. com.sap.gateway.core.ip.component.odata.exception.OsciException: Attempted read from closed stream., cause: java.io.IO Exception: Attempted read from closed stream.

3. com.sap.gateway.core.ip.component.odata.exception.OsciException: Error in retrieving Authorization header, cause: java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Status code:401; Reason:{"error":"invalid_client","error_description":"Bad client credentials"}


Please note that when we use HTTPS adapter in the receiver system it will works fine and data successfully passed from CPI to Commerce cloud.

OAuth Clients settings given to us from functional team from Back office. Could you please help us with configuration details to mitigate this issue.

entry.title: SAP ALM Summit EMEA 2025
entry.content:
Join us at the SAP ALM Summit 2025 as we explore the new horizons of SAP Cloud ALM! ​

Boost your ALM value by learning from real life customer experiences. Expand your knowledge through interactions with experts from SAP in hands-on labs and expert sessions. Identify how to leverage SAP’s integrated toolchain with SAP Cloud ALM, SAP Signavio, SAP LeanIX and built-in AI to evolve your business transformation. Learn what it takes to finalize your transition from SAP Solution Manager to SAP Cloud ALM. Make valuable connections and expand your ALM network.​

With an all-new location, shorter event duration, and new session formats, expect a highly focused event!​

Registration will be opening soon!​

entry.title: Re: Dynamically hiding parameters AND selection texts
entry.content: The reason I prefer to use MODIF ID modid in PARAMETERS or SELECT-OPTIONS syntax and then not checking actual field name, especially for other screen elements such as COMMENT.

entry.title: Unable to Create Cross-Company Code Purchasing across Countries in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I hope this message finds you well.

I am currently working on creating a Cross-Company Purchase Order (PO) in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, and I have encountered an issue that I need assistance with. Below is the scenario:

Scenario:

  • Company Codes:

    • USA1 (with Plant USA1)

    • GBA1 (with Plant GBA1)

  • Central Purchasing Organization: ABCD (assigned to both plants)

  • Purchase Order Details:

    • Company Code: USA1

    • Plant: GBA1

    • Purchasing Organization: ABCD

When attempting to create the PO, I am receiving the following error message:

"Please only use plants with local currency USD (Message no. 06166)"

Could you please someone assist me on this issue and your insights and support in resolving this issue would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your time and assistance.
Regards,
Madhu

entry.title: Re: Stay Certified with SAP Learning
entry.content: Paid for Learning hub 5 wks ago to 'Stay Certified'. Reviewed  'Prepare for Assessment', but Learning Hub will not let me in to Take Assessment. SAP automated response only available, had me put in a ticket: Case ID 5000129447.  We are getting near the end date for expiration on these certifications, can SAP get back to those of us needing to take the exam please?

entry.title: How to fetch known error in Action call for SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi experts,

we have created a process within SAP Build Process automation. The process includes an action call after an approval task.

Within the CAP application which is handling the action call we have defined known errors that will be returned as follows:

return req.error({
    code: 123, // internal code for identifying return messages
    message: "my return message",
    target: "where is the message caused",
    status: 4## //the error status
})

An error could be that a specific action was not done before approval by the approver himself.

However, if the action does not retrieve a success return (HTTP return status equals 4##) the whole process is put to an error state. Is there any possibility to catch this error within the process itself and send a notification to the MyInbox of a specific group/user?

Actually, we don't want the process to get into an error state for this scenario but instead execute an alternative path within the process itself.

 

regards

Emanuel

entry.title: Re: SAP TM - Drop shipment and returns scenario for Trans...
entry.content: Hi Ajit,

entry.title: Re: SAP TM - Drop shipment and returns scenario for Trans...
entry.content: There is no error as such, it is just that the FU is not getting added to the Freight order customer pick up.

entry.title: Re: Upgrade Crystal Server 2016 to 2020 in RHEL with Orac...
entry.content:
Since you likely have a support contract I suggest going here and create a support case and search for upgrade:

https://support.sap.com/en/index.html

CR Server is a standalone version of BO Enterprise, so any migration/upgrade info is the same.

Also go to help.sap.com for more documentation

entry.title: Imputed interest

This is regarding imputed interest calculation; in our business scenario, we are not using interest calculation. But in the Manage Customer Line Items app, we observed that the imputed interest calculation was filed with the interest amount.

Could you please suggest to us why this imputed interest is calculated?

Thanks 

Vijaya

entry.title: Re: unable to drill down in a Crystal report chart
entry.content:
On the new Server if you hit refresh when viewing the report what happens?

If you create a new simple report with a chart does that work?

It could be something has changed, possibly the Database Client?

Or maybe you need to log in first and then view the report.

Does a scheduled report when viewed work?

entry.title: CPI iFlow getting error: The metadata constraints '[Precision=0]' do not allow to format the value
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

we are using simple iFlow in CPI to create material document in SAP S4HANA Cloud public edition (2SL) with Odata service API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV. We tried to change message mapping but it was failing so we reverted it back the previous version but we are still getting the same error:

com.sap.gateway.core.ip.component.odata.exception.ODataV2ResponseParsingException: Caused by:org.apache.olingo.odata2.api.edm.EdmSimpleTypeException: The metadata constraints '[Precision=0]' do not allow to format the value 'java.util.GregorianCalendar[time=17423067770,areFieldsSet=true,areAllFieldsSet=true,lenient=true,zone=sun.util.calendar.ZoneInfo[id="GMT",offset=0,dstSavings=0,useDaylight=false,transitions=0,lastRule=null],firstDayOfWeek=1,minimalDaysInFirstWeek=1,ERA=1,YEAR=1970,MONTH=6,WEEK_OF_YEAR=30,WEEK_OF_MONTH=4,DAY_OF_MONTH=21,DAY_OF_YEAR=202,DAY_OF_WEEK=3,DAY_OF_WEEK_IN_MONTH=3,AM_PM=1,HOUR=3,HOUR_OF_DAY=15,MINUTE=44,SECOND=27,MILLISECOND=770,ZONE_OFFSET=0,DST_OFFSET=0]'. in EntitySet A_MaterialDocumentHeaderThe metadata constraints '[Precision=0]' do not allow to format the value 'java.util.GregorianCalendar[time=17423067770,areFieldsSet=true,areAllFieldsSet=true,lenient=true,zone=sun.util.calendar.ZoneInfo[id="GMT",offset=0,dstSavings=0,useDaylight=false,transitions=0,l...

We tried to send date with milliseconds, without, only zeros and still failing.

It is failing after request reply to SAP S4HANA system.

We are sending:

{
    "GoodsMovementCode": "02",
    "MaterialDocument": "",
    "MaterialDocumentYear": "",
    "PostingDate": "/Date(17423067770)/"
}

Does anybody know how to fix this issue?

Thanks in advance for your help.

I am having the same issue and I have contacted Support twice to understand the delay in the confirmation email and no response even though it says that you’ll get an answer within 24 hours.

Certifications expire in 7 days and still no word from SAP about Learning Hub Subscription order confirmation.

entry.title: Re: 🇦🇪 SAP Build: Create Business Apps and Processes Without Code (Dubai, UAE)
entry.content: My colleague and I have registered for the BTP session. We are currently working on a couple of projects, and this session would be extremely helpful. Could you please confirm our registration status? We’re really looking forward to it! We have RSVPd yes and we made it under 30 !

entry.title: Re: COMMIT/ROLLBACK in Custom Action in SAP RAP
entry.content:
Hello, 

Since the RAP Custom Action related logic is called as part of Behavior Handler Sequence and not part of Saver Sequence, calling a Commit inside the RAP Action code is not going to work.

I had a similar situation where I had to separate a Table update activity in a Separate LUW(not the current RAP LUW) and the solution I used was CL_ABAP_PARALLEL.

Check the below threads it might help:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/how-to-call-a-local-rest-api-a-custom-rap-api-inside-another-api-in-btp/qaq-p/13878723

https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-and-automation-blog-posts/using-class-cl-abap-parallel-for-mass-parallel-dialog-work-processes/ba-p/13579844

Thanks,

Sijin

entry.title: Sample File Link on Detail Screen - Agent Performance Management
entry.content:
In the Import Format, we upload sample files, and a link is displayed. By clicking that link, the sample file data is visible in a new tab.

Can we configure a detail screen where we can upload a sample file and view its contents(just like in import format)?

entry.title: Understanding the Regulatory Change of Abolition of MPF Offsetting in Hong Kong
entry.content:
What is the MPF Offsetting Arrangement?

The Mandatory Provident Fund (MPF) System is a retirement savings scheme in Hong Kong. Previously, employers could use the accrued benefits from their mandatory contributions (ERMC) to offset the SP and LSP owed to employees. This meant that the amount an employee received as SP or LSP could be reduced by the employer's contributions to the MPF.

What Changes with the Abolition?

The Hong Kong Special Administrative Region is set to implement a significant change in employment benefits with the abolition of the MPF offsetting arrangement, effective May 1, 2025. This change will impact how severance payments (SP) and long service payments (LSP) are calculated for employees. Starting from the transition date, employers will no longer be able to use their MPF contributions to offset SP and LSP. This change ensures that employees receive their full entitlements without deductions from their retirement savings.

Why is This Important?

For employees, this change means greater financial security upon termination or retirement, as their severance and long service payments will be protected. For employers, it necessitates a review of financial planning and budgeting to accommodate the full payment of SP and LSP without relying on MPF contributions.

For more detailed information, including legal guidelines and examples, visit the Labour Department's official website: https://www.op.labour.gov.hk/en/publication.html

It's crucial for both employers and employees to stay informed and prepared for the upcoming changes. Currently, employers can use the accrued benefits from their mandatory contributions under the MPF system to offset SP and LSP. However, starting from the transition date of May 1, 2025, this will no longer be allowed. Employers will need to adjust their payroll processes to comply with the new regulations.

Key Impacts on HR Business

  • Calculation of severance payment (SP) / long service payment (LSP): Employers will need to revise how they calculate SP and LSP. Detailed examples and guidelines are available on the Labour Department's official website: https://www.op.labour.gov.hk/en/pdf/publication9.pdf
  • Handling MPF Offsetting: For employees hired on or after the transition date, his/her SP/LSP cannot be offset by accrued benefits from ERMC. For existing employees are already in employment before the transition date,  only the SP/LSP in respect of the employment period before the transition date can be offset by ERMC.
  • Carved-out Benefits Calculation: Employers will need to understand and implement new calculations for carved-out benefits, ensuring compliance with the updated legislation.

SAP Solutions

SAP has released relevant enhancements in providing a streamlined approach to adapting to the changes:

SAP Note 3537970 to enhance LSP/SP calculations post-abolition:

  • Providing a checkbox to check if an employee is eligible for abolition.
  • Providing new wage types to store the pre-transition portion of LSP/SP, and the calculation base for LSP/SP before transition date.
  • Providing new model wage types to allow the user to maintain the calculation base for LSP/SP before transition date.
  • Enhancing the view V_T7HK4B to allow users to configure the wage types for the pre-transition portion.
  • Enhancing the payroll function HKLSP to calculate pre-transition and post-transition portion of LSP/SP.

SAP Note 3558713 to enhance handling MPF/ORS offsetting:

  • New wage types to store the LP/LSP relevant amounts:
    • The accrued benefits from ERMC.
    • The carved-out benefits.
    • Vested benefits of employers’ ORS contributions and accrued benefits from ERVC, remaining benefits, and gratuity.
    • The offsetting amount against LSP/SP pre-transition portion and post-transition portion.
  • New payroll calculation rules to process the entitlement wage types generated by the existing Entitlement Plan component.
  • New payroll calculation rules to offset the entitlement against LSP/SP pre-transition portion and post-transition portion.
  • New payroll scheme HKOS to include the new payroll calculation rules.
  • Changes to the payroll scheme HKTP to include the new payroll calculation rules.

SAP Note 3572491 to enhance carved-out benefits calculation:

  • Enhancement in the V_T7HK3B (contribution plan attributes) by adding a new checkbox Applicable for Abolition of MPF offsetting Arrangement.
  • New Constant for end user to determine which wage type shall be used to calculate average 12 months relevant income.
  • New rule to generate the new wage types used for calculating the average 12 months of relevant income.
  • New payroll function to read IT0346 for calculating YOS with ORS benefits, getting average wage type, and calculating the Carved-out Benefit.
  • Two new Wage Types which are used to store average 12 months relevant income.

Terminology:

  • MPF - Mandatory Provident Fund
  • LSP - Long Service Payment
  • SP - Severance Payment
  • ERMC - Employer Mandatory MPF Contributions
  • ERVC - Employer Voluntary MPF Contributions 
  • ORS - Occupational Retirement Scheme
  • YOS - Years of Service

Resources and Support

For more detailed information of regulatory change released by SAP Globalization, and further collaboration and support on HCM localization for Greater China, visit the provided links:

Regulatory Change Manager

Greater China - Human Capital Management Localization

 

Disclaimer:

SAP is not a law firm and is not able to provide any legal advice.
This blog, or any related comment, SAP's strategy and possible future developments, products and or platforms directions and functionality are all subject to change and may be changed at any time for any reason without notice.
This blog is not a commitment, promise or legal obligation to deliver any material, code or functionality.
This blog is provided without a warranty of any kind, either express or implied, including but not limited to, the implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps web preview stopped working suddenly
entry.content:
Same in incognito, tried different browsers (edge, chrome and firefox). All the same there.
I am on US10 on a free plan.

Earlier today I tried exporting, deleting and importing it again. Without success.

I also tried Building it as a web application. The Build failed with this being the entire log

AB version: 3.17.0
COMMAND:

USER_METERING_ENABLED=true SHOW_SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION=false SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION_DISMISSIBLE=true NEXT_SUPPORT_RELATIVE_PATHS=true NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=12240 --no-experimental-global-navigator  npxrnv export -p web -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn

FAILED with ERROR:

Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p web -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn

entry.title: IDOC Extension
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I have a requirement to create extension for SHPMNT05. I have created 2 segments header(4 fields) and item(1 field). . header is added to E1EDT20 and item added to E1EDL20. In FM IDOC_OUTPUT_SHPMNT, created an enhancement to fill the idoc structure for both header and item fields. when triggered from VT02N , only header fields are showing and item structure is blank. status code 26 & 29.

in log of status 26 showing error in program SAPLEDI1 in subroutine FA5_DOCUMENT_SYNTAX_CHECK.

need help on this issue. where am I going wrong. the enhancement in the FM is not getting triggered by breakpoint. only the above routine is triggered at breakpoint but not clear about what is causing issue.

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now manager LDAP data synchronization issues
entry.content: Thanks Anton for the suggestion ,yes thats what we are thinking to do as the next step to avoid these failures.Appreciate your feedback.

entry.title: Re: Pricing in delivery note - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public
entry.content:
Hi 

According to the Help (link), the Delivery Note is not intended to show the pricing.

"Delivery notes describe the contents of a delivery. They include details such as addresses, business partners, products, dates, quantities and weights, and dangerous goods information. The system creates a delivery note at different times depending on the type of delivery. For outbound deliveries, it creates the note when you post goods issue."

Indeed, if you check the data source (in Adobe LiveCycle Designer) the pricing data is not available in the Delivery Note Data Source, nor is it extendable in the Custom Fields -> Data Source Extension app.

What are your options?

  1. Consider using a custom field to hold the pricing information for the item and use the custom field on the form. (populate the custom field in the BAdI (For example LE_SHP_SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE)).
  2. Consider using another form like the Sales Order Confirmation or Pick List (The data source is extendable and has some limited pricing amount there in the data source extension part of the custom fields app).
  3. Make use of the BTP SAP Form Service by Adobe. This would be a side-by-side extensibility solution. There is a reference example on the extensibility explorer. In a nutshell, you could use the Event Mesh and react to one of the available Business Events (see the Business Accelerator hub), then use the public APIs to extract the desired information, then use the Form Service to generate the form .

I hope this helps

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: Re: 🇦🇪 SAP Build: Create Business Apps and Processes Without Code (Dubai, UAE)

entry.title: Entity Fields - Agent Performance Management
entry.content: Can we dynamically set fields to readonly based on the value selected in a prior field, which is a pick list?

entry.title: Unable to invoice SO line items
entry.content:
Hello All, good day.

We currently have issue on SO line items not being invoiced.

In the SO, the affected line items are currently set with rejection reason to avoid being processed and possibly the creation of a new PR/PO document.

The SO already was created with a PO document and this was processed by business. However in the PO document, the item was set with deletion flag which was a mistake. Customer shared they already processed the PO and would not want to create a new PO document for the affected SO items. Since it was not possible to reverse the deletion flag in the PO, they have done direct posting to invoice the PO document.

Now we are having issue on how to invoice the SO items.

Can anyone suggest/share idea if there is any way we can invoice the SO items without removing the rejection reason or creating new set of PR/PO documents?

Thank you in advance 🙂

entry.title: Re: 🇦🇪 SAP Build: Create Business Apps and Processes Without Code (Dubai, UAE)
entry.content: Hi @Fazu - Please check your inbox for a message.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible that spread square frame of item of ap...
entry.content:
Hi Yuki,

Unfortunately, there was no image posted with your question. If you could update it, someone may be able to help you.

For your second question, in the Fiori App Library, you can filter on the capability to do adaptation:

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: ICMR How can we manage the CLEARING STATUS = 3 in the matching rules?
entry.content:
In the ICMR configuration in ACDOCA reconciliation, we need to manage the matching rules considering the transactions with clearing status = 3 and clearing date <= to the period selected in the ICMR reconciliation balance.

If in period 1, company A has an accrual vs B and B has an invoice vs A.

The matching works, because the rule matches the 2 transactions.

In period 2 company A closes the accrual with the invoice, but this transaction remains not matched, because it has been matched in the period 1 how can I manage this case?

Thanks a lot for any support

Chiara

 

f

entry.title: Maintain the Business Partner in multiple languages
entry.content:
Is it possible to maintain the business partner in multiple languages in the public cloud

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Maintain the Business Partner in multiple languages
entry.content:
Yes, It is possible to maintain business Partners in Multiple languages using International Address Versions.

Kindly use configuration activity Activate International Address Versions - Client-Specific - 103268

Follow below steps for configuring International Address Versions :

  1. Open 'Manage Your Solution' app.
  2. Navigate to 'Configure Your Solution'.
  3. Choose configuration activity Activate International Address Versions  Client-Specific - 103268
  4. Select configure 

Refer below documentation for more details - International Address Versions

entry.title: Difference between Create Advance Return on Sales/Purchase Tax APP and PDF page numbering
entry.content:
We have faced an issue on Create advance return on sales/purchase tax.

The number page is different between what we see on SAP and when we download it on PDF.

How is this possible?

Why on PDF we have more pages?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Difference between Create Advance Return on Sales/Pur...
entry.content:
The difference in the page numbers is expected and is not an error. The first page in the pdf has the details of the selection parameters and hence the additional page.

When the parameter 'Short Header Will Be Output' is selected, the page number printed in the pdf is consistent with what is expected by the authorities and a running number for page numbers is used for subsequent months.

entry.title: Re: 🇦🇪 SAP Build: Create Business Apps and Processes Without Code (Dubai, UAE)
entry.content: replied . I have not received the confirmation yet !

entry.title: Unit of Measure in SAP EWM – Materials with ST instead of kg/g
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

In ERP, we have some materials maintained with the base unit of measure kg or g. These are also transferred to EWM in kg/g.
However, in EWM, we need to work with ST (pieces) instead, as we count the number of pieces rather than the weight. And its for the warehouse easier to count the materials in pieces rather than the weight. 

Unfortunately, we cannot simply change the unit of measure in ERP to ST.

What are the best ways to handle this in EWM or ERP so that we can work with ST instead of kg/g in EWM?

Thank you for your help 🙂

entry.title: Re: The same functional and matrix manager responsibiliti...
entry.content:
Hi,

We have Direct Managers and Matrix Managers contributing to the performance forms.

Since there are many ways they split their responsibilities, we have made is very simple !

Both have almost the same rights:

  • both can create/comment/rate objectives
  • both can contribute do the Career discussion (it's a section)
  • only the direct manager can date competencies (because it is a drop down rating), but both can comment to the section
  • both can send for sign-off.

This seems to work well for us, and when people ask how they manage do split the tasks, I say that they managed to define this for the employee's tasks and supervision, so they should be able to align on the performance form. 

Hope it helps,

Kris.

entry.title: Re: Build and deploy a CAP Project Node.js API with a SAP Fiori Elements UI and a managed approuter
entry.content:
Want to build 25x faster?

Check this blog post out https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/a-25x-faster-mta-yaml-build-for-sap-cap-node-js-projects/ba-p/14044449

John
